overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant futuristic city street. The scene features towering neon advertisements, elevated highway structures, and a mix of natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes various NPCs and vehicles in a dense commercial district.

events.description: passing colorful food stalls and vending machines lining the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a brown coat along the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking steadily ahead of the player

entered.detail: curved green metal highway overpass dominating the overhead space

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a neon-lit commercial district. The left side features vibrant food stalls and vending machines with glowing advertisements overhead. The player follows a pedestrian in a brown coat along the sheltered concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open sunlit intersection with crosswalk
crossing the street on yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles wait at traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk from the covered walkway to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross
pedestrian crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights
massive dark futuristic building with large purple neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright sunlight at a busy intersection. The player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while a black car waits at the traffic light. A massive monolithic building with purple neon signage dominates the right side of the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with palm trees and active street traffic

events.description: passing trash bags and debris scattered along the sidewalk edge

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the open sidewalk passing various pedestrians and observing street traffic

shirtless man with tattoos walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
large digital billboard displaying purple neon figure advertisement
white garbage bags and scattered litter along the sidewalk
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open sidewalk lined with palm trees and green metal railings. The street features moderate traffic with various vehicles passing by. Trash bags and debris are visible along the sidewalk edge, and pedestrians walk in opposing directions. Large digital billboards glow on the distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: less dense commercial street with distant highway ramp

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk with fewer pedestrians and more open views of the distant cityscape

entered.detail: curved highway ramp structure visible in the distance
open view of distant futuristic cityscape and skyline

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows a less dense commercial area with sparse pedestrian traffic. The elevated highway structure continues overhead while the view opens up to show distant highway ramps and the cityscape ahead. Palm trees recede into the distance as the walkway continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit underpass into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway structure, moving along a concrete walkway lined with glowing vending machines and vibrant food stalls while following a pedestrian in a brown coat. As the camera advances, the sheltered environment gives way to an open plaza, shifting the lighting from artificial neon hues to brilliant natural sunlight. The scene then expands across a yellow-striped crosswalk beside a waiting black car before turning toward a massive monolithic building dominated by purple neon signage.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a crowded commercial strip into a more open urban vista. It begins by navigating a bustling walkway lined with palm trees and green metal railings, passing by pedestrians and scattered debris while traffic flows steadily beside the path. As the camera moves forward, the dense crowd thins and the glow of distant digital billboards becomes a backdrop to the surrounding architecture. The scene then opens up beneath the looming shadow of an elevated highway, where the pedestrian traffic sparses and the view expands to reveal distant highway ramps. Finally, the palm trees recede into the distance as the camera continues its forward trajectory toward the sprawling cityscape ahead.
